info.name: SmartTrack Health API
info.description:
SmartTrack Health — HIPAA-compliant IDD care documentation & billing platform API.

## Authentication
All endpoints (except those marked Public) require a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

## Response Format
```json
{
  "message": "string",
  "data": {},
  "meta": { "pagination": {} },
  "success": true
}
```

## Roles
- **AGENCY_OWNER** — Agency owner (full access)
- **ADMIN** — Agency administrator
- **SUPERVISOR** — Supervises DSP staff
- **DSP** — Direct Support Professional (staff)
- **CLINICIAN** — Clinical staff
- **BILLING_SPECIALIST** — Billing console access
- **FINANCE_MANAGER** — Finance console access
- **GUARDIAN** — Guardian portal access

## Enums

**ServiceRecordStatus:** DRAFT, PENDING_REVIEW, APPROVED, REJECTED

**IncidentStatus:** DRAFT, SUBMITTED, UNDER_REVIEW, CLOSED

**CorrectionStatus:** PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED

**MarResult:** GIVEN, REFUSED, HELD, NOT_AVAILABLE

**PunchType:** CLOCK_IN, CLOCK_OUT



**ClaimStatus:** DRAFT, VALIDATED, SUBMITTED, ACCEPTED, REJECTED, DENIED, PAID, PARTIAL_PAID, APPEALED, WRITTEN_OFF, VOIDED, REPLACED

**ServiceAuthorizationStatus:** ACTIVE, EXPIRED, VOIDED

**CoveragePriority:** 1 = Primary, 2 = Secondary, 3 = Tertiary

## State Machines

**Service Records:** DRAFT → PENDING_REVIEW → APPROVED | REJECTED → DRAFT (resubmit)

**Incidents:** DRAFT → SUBMITTED → UNDER_REVIEW → CLOSED

**Corrections:** PENDING → APPROVED | REJECTED

**Claims:** DRAFT → VALIDATED → SUBMITTED → ACCEPTED | REJECTED → DENIED | PAID | PARTIAL_PAID → APPEALED | WRITTEN_OFF | VOIDED | REPLACED

item.name: Health

request.description: Public health check endpoint. No authentication required.

item.description: System health endpoints.

item.name: Auth

request.description:
**Public** — Create a new user account.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| name | string | Yes | Full name |
| email | string | Yes | Valid email |
| password | string | Yes | Min 8 characters |

**Public** — Verify email address with OTP code.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| email | string | Yes | Email to verify |
| otp | string | Yes | 6-digit OTP code |

**Public** — Resend OTP verification code.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| email | string | Yes | Email to resend OTP to |

**Public** — Sign in with email and password. Returns access and refresh tokens.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| email | string | Yes | Registered email |
| password | string | Yes | Account password |

**Public** — Sign in with Google OAuth2 ID token. User must already exist in the system.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| idToken | string | Yes | Google OAuth2 ID token |

**Public** — Request a password reset email.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| email | string | Yes | Registered email |

**Public** — Reset password using a reset token.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| token | string | Yes | Password reset token |
| newPassword | string | Yes | Min 8 characters |

**Public** — Exchange a refresh token for new access and refresh tokens.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| refreshToken | string | Yes | Valid refresh token |
**Authenticated** — Get current authenticated user's profile.
**Authenticated** — Get current session info.
**Authenticated** — Sign out and invalidate session.

item.description: Authentication endpoints. Sign up, sign in, token management, and session handling.

item.name: Admin > Organizations

request.description:
**Authenticated** — Create a new organization.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| legal_name | string | Yes | Legal entity name |
| dba | string | No | Doing business as |
| npi | string | Yes | 10-digit NPI number |
| ein | string | Yes | Employer ID number |
| address_line1 | string | No | Street address |
| address_line2 | string | No | Suite/unit |
| city | string | No | City |
| state | string | No | 2-letter state code |
| zip | string | No | ZIP code |
| phone | string | No | Phone number |
**Authenticated** — Get organization by ID.
**Authenticated** — Update organization. All fields optional.

item.description: Organization management endpoints.

item.name: Admin > Users

request.description:
**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List all users in the organization with pagination.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Invite a user to the organization.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| name | string | Yes | Full name |
| email | string | Yes | Valid email |
| role | AgencyRole | Yes | ADMIN, SUPERVISOR, DSP, CLINICIAN, BILLING_SPECIALIST, FINANCE_MANAGER, GUARDIAN, AGENCY_OWNER, SCHEDULER, HR_MANAGER |
| phone | string | No | Phone number |
| supervisor_id | UUID | No | Assigned supervisor |
| sub_permissions | object | No | Fine-grained permissions |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get user by ID.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Update user profile, role, or status.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| name | string | No | Full name |
| phone | string | No | Phone number |
| role | AgencyRole | No | New role |
| status | string | No | ACTIVE, INACTIVE, INVITED |
| supervisor_id | UUID | No | Assigned supervisor |
| sub_permissions | object | No | Permissions map |
| certifications | string[] | No | Certification list |
| license_info | string | No | License information |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Assign a role to a user.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| role | AgencyRole | Yes | New role to assign |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Update user's fine-grained sub-permissions.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| sub_permissions | object | Yes | Key-value boolean map |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Deactivate (archive) a user. Does not permanently delete.

item.description: User management endpoints. Requires AGENCY_OWNER or ADMIN role.

item.name: Admin > Programs

request.description:
**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List all programs in the organization.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Create a new program.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| name | string | Yes | Program name |
| type | string | No | e.g., RESIDENTIAL, DAY_HABILITATION |
| description | string | No | Description |
| active | boolean | No | Default: true |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get program by ID.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Update a program. All fields optional.

item.description: Program management endpoints. Requires AGENCY_OWNER or ADMIN role.

item.name: Admin > Sites

request.description:
**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List all sites in the organization.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List sites filtered by program.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Create a new site.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| program_id | UUID | Yes | Parent program |
| name | string | Yes | Site name |
| address_line1 | string | Yes | Street address |
| address_line2 | string | No | Suite/unit |
| city | string | Yes | City |
| state | string | Yes | 2-letter state code |
| zip | string | Yes | ZIP code |
| latitude | number | No | -90 to 90 |
| longitude | number | No | -180 to 180 |
| active | boolean | No | Default: true |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get site by ID.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Update a site. All fields optional.

item.description: Site management endpoints. Requires AGENCY_OWNER or ADMIN role.

item.name: Admin > Individuals

request.description:
**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN, SUPERVISOR, CLINICIAN

List all individuals in the organization.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Create a new individual (service recipient). PHI fields are encrypted at rest.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| first_name | string | Yes | First name (encrypted) |
| last_name | string | Yes | Last name (encrypted) |
| date_of_birth | string | Yes | YYYY-MM-DD (encrypted) |
| ssn | string | No | SSN (encrypted) |
| medicaid_id | string | No | Medicaid ID (encrypted) |
| diagnosis_codes | string | No | Comma-separated ICD-10 (encrypted) |
| address | string | No | Full address (encrypted) |
| phone | string | No | Phone (encrypted) |
| emergency_contact | string | No | Emergency contact (encrypted) |
| guardian_id | UUID | No | Guardian user ID |
| active | boolean | No | Default: true |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN, SUPERVISOR, CLINICIAN

Get individual by ID. PHI fields are decrypted in the response.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Update individual details. All fields optional.

item.description: Individual (service recipient) management. PHI fields are AES-256 encrypted at rest.

item.name: Admin > Staff Assignments

request.description:
**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN, SUPERVISOR

List staff assignments for an individual.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN, SUPERVISOR

List assignments for a specific staff member.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Create a staff-to-individual assignment.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| staff_id | UUID | Yes | Staff user ID |
| individual_id | UUID | Yes | Individual ID |
| program_id | UUID | Yes | Program context |
| effective_date | string | Yes | YYYY-MM-DD |
| end_date | string | No | YYYY-MM-DD (null = ongoing) |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN, SUPERVISOR

Get assignment by ID.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Update a staff assignment.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| end_date | string | No | YYYY-MM-DD |
| active | boolean | No | Toggle active state |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

End a staff assignment.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| end_date | string | Yes | YYYY-MM-DD end date |

item.description: Staff-to-individual assignment management.

item.name: Admin > Service Records

request.description:
**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List all service records in the organization. Read-only admin view.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List service records for a specific individual.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List service records by a specific staff member.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get a service record by ID. Read-only.

item.description: Admin read-only view of all service records.

item.name: Admin > Incidents

request.description:
**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List all incidents in the organization. Read-only.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List incidents for a specific individual.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get an incident by ID. Read-only.

item.description: Admin read-only view of all incidents.

item.name: Staff > Service Records

request.description:
**Roles:** DSP

Create a new service record. Staff must be assigned to the individual.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| individual_id | UUID | Yes | Individual receiving service |
| program_id | UUID | No | Program context |
| service_date | string | Yes | YYYY-MM-DD |
| service_code_id | UUID | No | Service code reference |
| units_delivered | number | Yes | Positive number |

**Roles:** DSP

List the current staff member's service records. Optional status filter.

**Status values:** DRAFT, PENDING_REVIEW, APPROVED, REJECTED

**Roles:** DSP

Get a service record by ID. Only returns records owned by the current staff.

**Roles:** DSP

Update a service record. Only allowed when status is DRAFT or REJECTED. APPROVED records are immutable.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| program_id | UUID | No | Program context |
| service_date | string | No | YYYY-MM-DD |
| service_code_id | UUID | No | Service code reference |
| units_delivered | number | No | Positive number |

**Roles:** DSP

Submit a DRAFT service record for supervisor review. Transitions status: DRAFT → PENDING_REVIEW.

item.description: DSP staff service record endpoints. Staff can only see their own records.

item.name: Staff > Daily Notes

request.description:
**Roles:** DSP

Create a daily note for a service record. Cannot add notes to APPROVED service records. Content is PHI-encrypted.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| content | string | Yes | Note content (encrypted at rest) |
| observations | string | No | Observations (encrypted at rest) |

**Roles:** DSP

List all daily notes for a service record.

**Roles:** DSP

Get a single daily note by ID.

**Roles:** DSP

Update a daily note. Cannot update notes on APPROVED service records.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| content | string | No | Updated content (encrypted) |
| observations | string | No | Updated observations (encrypted) |

item.description: Daily notes nested under service records. PHI-encrypted content.

item.name: Staff > Incidents

body.raw:
{
  "individual_id": "{{individualId}}",
  "type": "BEHAVIORAL",
  "description": "Individual became agitated during afternoon transition.",
  "immediate_action": "Staff used de-escalation techniques. Individual calmed within 10 minutes.",
  "occurred_at": "2026-03-12T14:30:00.000Z"
}

request.description:
**Roles:** DSP

Report a new incident. Created in DRAFT status. PHI fields encrypted.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| individual_id | UUID | Yes | Individual involved |
| type | string | Yes | Incident type category |
| description | string | Yes | What happened (encrypted) |
| immediate_action | string | No | Action taken (encrypted) |
| occurred_at | string | Yes | ISO 8601 timestamp |

**Roles:** DSP

List incidents for an individual reported by the current staff member.

**Roles:** DSP

Get an incident by ID.

**Roles:** DSP

Update a DRAFT incident.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| type | string | No | Incident type |
| description | string | No | Updated description (encrypted) |
| immediate_action | string | No | Updated action (encrypted) |

**Roles:** DSP

Submit a DRAFT incident for supervisor review. Transitions: DRAFT → SUBMITTED.

item.description: DSP staff incident reporting. State machine: DRAFT → SUBMITTED → UNDER_REVIEW → CLOSED.

item.name: Staff > ISP Data Points

request.description:
**Roles:** DSP

Record an ISP data point measurement.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| goal_id | UUID | Yes | ISP goal being tracked |
| service_record_id | UUID | No | Link to service record |
| value | string | Yes | Measured value or observation |

**Roles:** DSP

List data points by ISP goal.

**Roles:** DSP

List data points linked to a specific service record.

item.description: ISP (Individual Service Plan) data point tracking by staff.

item.name: Staff > MAR Entries

request.description:
**Roles:** DSP

Record a Medication Administration Record entry. PHI fields encrypted.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| individual_id | UUID | Yes | Individual receiving medication |
| drug_name | string | Yes | Medication name (encrypted) |
| dose | string | Yes | Dosage (encrypted) |
| route | string | No | Route of administration (encrypted) |
| scheduled_time | string | Yes | ISO 8601 scheduled time |
| administered_time | string | No | ISO 8601 actual time given |
| result | MarResult | Yes | GIVEN, REFUSED, HELD, NOT_AVAILABLE |
| notes | string | No | Additional notes |

**Roles:** DSP

List MAR entries for an individual.

**Roles:** DSP

Get a MAR entry by ID.

item.description: Medication Administration Record (MAR) tracking. Drug info is PHI-encrypted.

item.name: Staff > Correction Requests

request.description:
**Roles:** DSP

Create a correction request for an APPROVED service record. APPROVED records are immutable — corrections go through this append-only workflow.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| service_record_id | UUID | Yes | The approved service record |
| requested_changes | string | Yes | Description of corrections needed |

**Roles:** DSP

List correction requests for a specific service record.

**Roles:** DSP

Get a correction request by ID.

item.description: Staff-initiated correction requests for APPROVED service records. Append-only workflow.

item.name: Supervisor > Service Records

request.description:
**Roles:** SUPERVISOR

Get the service record review queue (PENDING_REVIEW records).

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR

Get a service record by ID for review.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR

Approve a PENDING_REVIEW service record. Transitions: PENDING_REVIEW → APPROVED. Record becomes immutable after approval.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| notes | string | No | Approval notes |

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR

Reject a PENDING_REVIEW service record. Transitions: PENDING_REVIEW → REJECTED. Staff can then edit and resubmit.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| rejection_reason | string | Yes | Reason for rejection |

item.description: Supervisor review queue for service records. Approve or reject with reasons.

item.name: Supervisor > Incidents

request.description:
**Roles:** SUPERVISOR

Get the incident review queue (SUBMITTED incidents).

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR

Get an incident by ID for review.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR

Start reviewing a SUBMITTED incident. Transitions: SUBMITTED → UNDER_REVIEW.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR

Close an UNDER_REVIEW incident with supervisor comments. Transitions: UNDER_REVIEW → CLOSED.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| supervisor_comments | string | No | Closing comments (encrypted) |

item.description: Supervisor incident review. State machine: SUBMITTED → UNDER_REVIEW → CLOSED.

item.name: Supervisor > Correction Requests

request.description:
**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get pending correction requests awaiting review.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get a correction request by ID.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Approve a PENDING correction request. Transitions: PENDING → APPROVED.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| reviewer_notes | string | No | Notes on the approval |

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Reject a PENDING correction request. Transitions: PENDING → REJECTED.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| reviewer_notes | string | No | Notes on the rejection |

item.description: Supervisor review of correction requests for approved service records.

item.name: Clinical > ISP Goals

body.raw:
{
  "individual_id": "{{individualId}}",
  "description": "Improve independent meal preparation skills",
  "target": "Prepare 3 meals independently per week",
  "effective_start": "2026-03-01",
  "effective_end": "2026-09-01"
}

request.description:
**Roles:** CLINICIAN

Create an ISP (Individual Service Plan) goal. Description is PHI-encrypted.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| individual_id | UUID | Yes | Individual ID |
| description | string | Yes | Goal description (encrypted) |
| target | string | No | Target outcome |
| effective_start | string | Yes | YYYY-MM-DD start date |
| effective_end | string | No | YYYY-MM-DD end date |

**Roles:** CLINICIAN, SUPERVISOR

List ISP goals for an individual.

**Roles:** CLINICIAN, SUPERVISOR

Get an ISP goal by ID.

**Roles:** CLINICIAN

Update an ISP goal.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| description | string | No | Updated description (encrypted) |
| target | string | No | Updated target |
| effective_end | string | No | YYYY-MM-DD end date |
| active | boolean | No | Toggle active state |

item.description: Clinical ISP goal management. Clinician-only write access, Supervisor read access.

item.name: Clinical > Behavior Plans

request.description:
**Roles:** CLINICIAN

Create a new behavior plan. Content is PHI-encrypted. Starts at version 1.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| individual_id | UUID | Yes | Individual ID |
| content | string | Yes | Plan content (encrypted) |
| effective_date | string | Yes | YYYY-MM-DD |
| end_date | string | No | YYYY-MM-DD |

**Roles:** CLINICIAN

Create a new version of a behavior plan. Deactivates the current active plan and increments version number.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| individual_id | UUID | Yes | Individual ID |
| content | string | Yes | New plan content (encrypted) |
| effective_date | string | Yes | YYYY-MM-DD |
| end_date | string | No | YYYY-MM-DD |

**Roles:** CLINICIAN

List all behavior plan versions for an individual.

**Roles:** CLINICIAN

Get a behavior plan by ID.

**Roles:** CLINICIAN

Update a behavior plan.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| content | string | No | Updated content (encrypted) |
| end_date | string | No | YYYY-MM-DD |
| active | boolean | No | Toggle active state |

item.description: Clinical behavior plan (BTP) management with versioning. Content is PHI-encrypted.

item.name: Staff — EVV Punches

request.description:
**Roles:** DSP

Clock in for an individual. Timestamp is set server-side. GPS is validated against site coordinates but does not block the punch.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| individual_id | UUID | Yes | Individual being served |
| shift_id | UUID | No | Associated shift |
| gps_latitude | number | No | -90 to 90 |
| gps_longitude | number | No | -180 to 180 |
| device_id | string | No | Device identifier |
| notes | string | No | Optional notes |

**Roles:** DSP

Clock out — finds matching open clock-in for the same staff+individual. Timestamp is set server-side.

**Roles:** DSP

List my EVV punches with pagination.

**Roles:** DSP

Get an EVV punch by ID (staff-scoped).

item.description: Staff EVV punch clock-in/clock-out. DSPs record service sessions with GPS verification.

item.name: Staff — EVV Corrections

request.description:
**Roles:** DSP

Create an EVV correction request for a missed or incorrect punch.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| individual_id | UUID | Yes | Individual involved |
| punch_type | enum | Yes | CLOCK_IN or CLOCK_OUT |
| requested_time | ISO 8601 | Yes | Corrected timestamp |
| reason | string | Yes | Why correction is needed |
| shift_id | UUID | No | Associated shift |

**Roles:** DSP

List my EVV correction requests.

**Roles:** DSP

Get an EVV correction request by ID.

item.description: Staff EVV correction requests. DSPs can request corrections for missed/incorrect punches.

item.name: Supervisor — EVV Punches

request.description:
**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List all EVV punches with optional filters.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get clock-in records without matching clock-out past the threshold.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List EVV punches for a specific staff member.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get an EVV punch by ID.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Flag a missed punch — auto-creates a correction request on behalf of the staff member.

item.description: Supervisor EVV punch management. View all punches, detect missed punches, flag corrections.

item.name: Supervisor — EVV Corrections

request.description:
**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List PENDING EVV correction requests.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get an EVV correction by ID.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Approve an EVV correction. Creates a new EvvPunch with the corrected data.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Reject an EVV correction with reviewer notes.

item.description: Supervisor EVV correction review workflow. Approve (creates corrected punch) or reject corrections.

item.name: Admin — EVV Punches

request.description:
**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List all EVV punches with optional filters (staff_id, individual_id, punch_type).

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get aggregate EVV stats: total punches, clock-ins, clock-outs, location confirmation rate.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List EVV punches for a specific staff member.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List EVV punches for a specific individual.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get an EVV punch by ID.

item.description: Admin EVV punch management. Full org-wide visibility with filtering, staff/individual drill-down, and aggregate stats.

item.name: Staff — Shifts

request.description:
**Roles:** DSP

List shifts assigned to the authenticated staff member.

**Roles:** DSP

Get a specific shift assigned to the authenticated staff member.

**Roles:** DSP

Accept a published shift. Transitions status from PUBLISHED → ACCEPTED.

**Roles:** DSP

Reject a published shift. Transitions status from PUBLISHED → REJECTED. Reason is optional.

item.description: Staff shift management. DSPs can view their assigned shifts and accept/reject published shifts.

item.name: Supervisor — Shifts

request.description:
**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Create a new DRAFT shift. Validates staff assignment and checks for scheduling conflicts.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List all shifts in the organization with optional filters.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Check scheduling conflicts for a staff member on a given date/time.

**Roles:** SUPERVISOR, AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List all shifts for a specific staff member.

Submit a validated claim for processing. Transitions claim to SUBMITTED status.

| payer_name | string | Yes | Payer display name |
| payer_id_edi | string | Yes | EDI payer ID |
| state | string | Yes | 2-letter state code |

**Authenticated** — Update a global payer.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| payer_name | string | No | Updated payer name |
**Authenticated** — Deactivate (soft-delete) a global payer.

request.description:

| max_individuals | integer | Yes | Max individuals |
| max_users | integer | Yes | Max users |
| storage_gb | integer | Yes | Storage in GB |
| api_calls_monthly | integer | Yes | Monthly API call limit |
| modules_included | string[] | Yes | Included module names |
| price_cents_monthly | integer | Yes | Price in cents |
**Authenticated** — List all plan definitions.

item.description: Platform plan/tier definition management.

item.name: Break Glass

request.description:
**Authenticated** — Request an emergency break-glass session.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| org_id | string | Yes | Target organization UUID |
| ticket_id | string | Yes | Support ticket reference |
| reason | string | Yes | Justification |
| data_scope | string | Yes | READ_ONLY or READ_WRITE |
**Authenticated** — Approve a pending break-glass session (requires second operator).

**Authenticated** — End an active break-glass session.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| actions_summary | string | Yes | Summary of actions taken |
**Authenticated** — List break-glass sessions.
**Authenticated** — Get a specific break-glass session.
**Authenticated** — Get all active break-glass sessions for an organization.

item.description: Emergency break-glass access to tenant data with full audit trail.

item.name: Audit Log

request.description: **Authenticated** — List platform-level audit logs with optional filters.

item.description: Platform-level audit log viewer.

item.name: Dashboard

request.description: **Authenticated** — Platform health dashboard with aggregate metrics (org count, active users, pending applications, etc.).

item.description: Platform health and metrics dashboard.

SuperAdmin console — platform-level operations. Requires a platform operator JWT.

## Operator Roles
- **PLATFORM_ADMIN** — Full platform access
- **ONBOARDING_SPECIALIST** — Application review & onboarding only

## Key Concepts
- **Applications** follow a state machine: SUBMITTED → UNDER_REVIEW → APPROVED | REJECTED → PROVISIONED
- **Break Glass** provides audited emergency access to tenant data
- **Global Service Codes / Payers** are platform-wide references that tenants map locally

item.name: Admin > Notifications

request.description:
**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

List notifications for the current user with optional filters.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get count of unread notifications for the current user.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Get notification preferences for the current user.

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Update notification preferences.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| email_enabled | boolean | No | Global email toggle |
| sms_enabled | boolean | No | Global SMS toggle |
| in_app_enabled | boolean | No | Global in-app toggle |
| preferences | object | No | Per-type channel overrides |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Mark a specific notification as read or unread.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| read | boolean | Yes | true to mark read, false to mark unread |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Mark all notifications as read, optionally filtered by type.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| type | string | No | Filter by notification type |

body.raw:
{
  "user_id": "{{userId}}",
  "type": "AUTH_EXPIRING",
  "title": "Authorization Expiring Soon",
  "message": "Service authorization for individual will expire in 30 days.",
  "entity_type": "service_authorization",
  "entity_id": "{{serviceAuthorizationId}}"
}

request.description:
**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Create a notification for a specific user.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| user_id | UUID | Yes | Target user |
| type | string | Yes | Notification type |
| title | string | Yes | Notification title |
| message | string | Yes | Notification body |
| entity_type | string | No | Related entity type |
| entity_id | UUID | No | Related entity ID |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Trigger authorization threshold check. Scans authorizations nearing expiry or utilization limits and creates notifications.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| authorization_id | UUID | No | Check specific authorization only |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Trigger review reminder notifications for overdue service records.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| overdue_hours | number | No | Hours threshold for overdue (default: 48) |

**Roles:** AGENCY_OWNER, ADMIN

Cleanup old read notifications beyond the retention period.

item.description: Admin notification management — list, read, preferences, triggers, and cleanup.
